settings.show_only_used_tags: Show only tags that have discussions
settings.show_tag_count: Show discussion count next to tag names
settings.external_stats_native_url_help: Direct OpenTracker stats URL returning XML. Example: http://IP:6969/stats?mode=everything
settings.external_stats_cache_ttl_help: How long fetched stats are considered fresh. During this window nobody hits the tracker — everyone is served from the shared cache. Default: 30s.
settings.external_stats_max_time_help: Time limit for a single fetch from the tracker. A large tracker can take ~a minute to compute stats — raise this if they don't finish loading. Only one worker fetches at a time. Default: 30s.
settings.external_stats_refresh_help: How often to refresh external tracker stats. Default: 5 seconds.
settings.search_debounce_ms_help: Delay before firing a search while typing. Higher = fewer requests. Default: 500ms
settings.ratelimit_enabled_help: Each visitor has a point budget for searching that refills over time, so casual use stays smooth but rapid spamming is stopped. When the budget runs out the IP is temporarily blocked (settings below).
settings.ratelimit_block_header: When points run out → temporary IP block
settings.ratelimit_start_help: Initial points given to each visitor. Default: 10
settings.ratelimit_refill_seconds_help: How often +N points are added back. Default: 15s
settings.ratelimit_refill_amount_help: How many points are added per interval. Default: 1
settings.ratelimit_guest_extra_help: Added to every action cost for non-logged-in visitors. Default: +2
settings.ratelimit_block_seconds_help: How long an IP stays blocked after running out of points. Points do not refill while blocked. Default: 60s
settings.ratelimit_block_reset_help: What the visitor's budget becomes once the IP block expires. "Full" is more forgiving; "empty" keeps them throttled (points then trickle back at the refill rate). During the block points never refill — it always lasts the full duration and is not lifted early.
settings.title_length_help: Title column is varchar(200). Min must be at least 1, max at most 200.
settings.content_length_help: Content column is mediumtext (up to 16 million chars). Set 0 to allow empty posts.
settings.theme_mode_help: Auto detects OS/browser dark mode preference.
settings.category_label_help: Leave empty to use the default translation.
settings.resolution_label_help: Leave empty to use the default translation.

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

forum.rate_limited: Too many actions in a short time. Please try again in {seconds}s.
